earliest_restart_point: Re-read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture/Phytoritas.md, .rah/state/status.json, .rah/state/gates.json, .rah/memory/wakeup.md, and .rah/plans/current_loop.md; then start the next non-trivial change from a fresh issue/branch instead of reusing the merged issue74 loop.
restart_point: Use `main` as the compact control baseline after PR #75, keep the issue65 shell, issue67 strategy summary, and issue69 copy cleanup as merged history, and open a new issue/branch before the next non-trivial implementation or refactor slice.
next_action: Issue #74 is closed and merged through PR #75, so the remaining control-copy cleanup now lives on `main`.
